one_time_description: CANDO revenue of $2,155,552 (vs $181,182 prior year) and prior period reimbursements of $352,149 appear non-recurring; unexpended funds transferred from prior year of $1,808,187 also noted
economic_notes: MFN Land Development Limited Partnership operates real estate and land development on fee simple lands. Muskowekwan Resources Ltd. participates in potash resource development with Encanto Potash Corp. Muskowekwan Gas Bar & Confectionary Ltd. operates retail operations with $3,071,587 revenue. Muskowekwan Business Development Company II Ltd. also exists as GBE.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 (filed March 27, 2023 - one year late). Province is Saskatchewan (SK). 7 fully consolidated entities including Muskowekwan Gaming Inc. and Muskowekwan Family Healing & Wellness Centre Inc. 4 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis including MFN Land Development LP and Muskowekwan Resources Ltd. Muskowekwan Resources Ltd. has a $9.684M debenture debt (matured 2017) to CIC Asset Management - First Nation has no liability for this. Deferred revenue (unexpended ISC funds) increased significantly from $1.755M to $6.376M. CANDO revenue jumped from $181K to $2.156M - likely non-recurring. Restricted cash includes CMHC replacement/operating reserves of $250,253. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $16,385,803 + CMHC $545,730 + Western Economic Diversification $333,333 - note TATC and TCFS may be pass-through. Long-term debt includes CMHC mortgages current ($467,286) + long-term ($5,123,008) plus other LTD current ($246,204) + long-term ($2,021,401). Annual debt service includes LTD repayment $290,200 + CMHC repayment $465,129 = $755,329.
